overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a detailed New York City environment at night. The clip transitions from street corners to narrow alleyways and past parked school buses, showcasing the game's urban atmosphere with artificial lighting, wet reflective pavement, and a mix of historic brick buildings and modern glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street corner with commercial buildings

events.description: Spider-Man stops walking and tilts camera up to look at the tall skyscrapers
Camera returns to level and Spider-Man resumes walking forward

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man stands at a street corner, looks up at the surrounding skyscrapers, then continues walking toward an alley

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street in the distance

Parked white car on the street corner
Modern glass and steel skyscraper towering above surrounding buildings
Street tree with autumn-colored yellow foliage

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man stands at a city street corner at night, surrounded by a mix of historic brick buildings and modern skyscrapers. He looks up at the towering glass buildings above, then continues walking. The street is wet with reflections of streetlights, and a few pedestrians are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alleyway between brick buildings

events.description: Spider-Man enters a narrow alleyway from the main street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks steadily down the narrow alley between tall brick buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the alley wall watching Spider-Man pass

entered.detail: Tall brick walls on both sides of the narrow passage
Black metal fire escape stairs attached to the building facade
Large metal trash dumpsters against the left wall

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man enters a narrow urban alleyway flanked by tall brick walls with metal fire escapes. The alley contains dumpsters and trash bags, with a single pedestrian standing against the wall. The sky is mostly blocked by the surrounding buildings, and the path is illuminated by sparse street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley approaching main street with tall office buildings

events.description: Spider-Man exits the narrow alley onto a wider street with tall buildings
Spider-Man stops and looks up at a tall illuminated skyscraper

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks through the alley, exits onto a main street, and stops to look up at a towering illuminated building

entered.detail: Massive modern skyscraper with bright vertical lighting on its facade
American flag on a pole attached to a building
Contemporary office building with glass curtain walls

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man emerges from the alley onto a wider downtown street dominated by a massive illuminated skyscraper. He pauses to look up at the towering building with its vertical light strips. The area features modern glass architecture and an American flag visible on the right side.

events.description: Spider-Man resumes walking after looking up at the building
Spider-Man crosses the street at a marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks along the sidewalk and crosses the street at a crosswalk, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past on the street

entered.detail: White painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
Blue newspaper vending box on the sidewalk
Building wall covered in colorful graffiti art

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks through a busy downtown area with moderate pedestrian traffic. He crosses a street at a marked crosswalk, passing a white sedan and walking past a building with colorful graffiti. The scene features typical city street elements including a newspaper vending machine and street trees with autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street transitioning to school bus parking area

events.description: Spider-Man turns right into a narrower street with parked school buses
Enters the narrow alley with parked yellow school buses on the right

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks down the street, passes pedestrians on the sidewalk, and turns into an alley with parked school buses

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing on the sidewalk conversing

entered.detail: Line of yellow school buses parked along the right side of the alley
Multi-story building with green-tinted brick facade
Industrial-style red brick building with large windows

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues walking past pedestrians and turns into a narrower street. The environment transitions to an alley with a green brick building on the left and a line of yellow school buses parked on the right. The wet pavement reflects the streetlights, and the alley has an industrial feel with trash bags visible near the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with parked school buses

events.description: Spider-Man continues walking past the line of school buses

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks down the narrow alley passing the row of parked yellow school buses on his right

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man proceeds down the narrow alleyway, walking alongside a long line of parked yellow school buses on the right. The alley is enclosed by brick walls on both sides, with the green brick building on the left and the buses creating a corridor effect. The area is devoid of pedestrians, with only the parked vehicles and distant city lights visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal New York City landscape that shifts from open street corners to claustrophobic industrial alleys. It begins with Spider-Man standing on a wet street corner surrounded by a mix of historic brick and modern glass skyscrapers before he turns into a narrow alleyway flanked by fire escapes and dumpsters. As he emerges back into the downtown area, the scene opens up to reveal a massive illuminated skyscraper and a bustling crosswalk filled with pedestrians, autumn foliage, and colorful graffiti. The camera then follows him as he turns away from the crowd and enters a second, narrower street where the environment transitions into an industrial corridor. Finally, the view tightens as he walks past a long line of parked yellow school buses and green brick walls, moving deeper into the quiet, reflective alleyway.
